ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector */,
  "data_year" INTEGER /* Year of the data record */,
  "energy_value" REAL /* Energy value */,
  "energy_unit" TEXT /* Unit of energy measurement (e.g., BTU, kWh, etc.) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the external data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of record creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of record update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector's energy involvement */,
  "sector_type" TEXT /* Type of sector (e.g., primary, secondary, tertiary) */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent sector (for sub-sectors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_mappings" (
  "sector_mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector mapping */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent sector */,
  "sub_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_mapping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "is_forecast_year" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the year is a forecast year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy forecast record */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector being forecasted */,
  "forecast_year" INTEGER /* Year for the forecast */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecasted energy value */,
  "forecast_model" TEXT /* Model used for forecasting (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_forecasts_forecast_model FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_model") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_forecasts_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the forecasting model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accessed data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_record_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report (could be extensive) */,
  "generated_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of report generation */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report requested */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data provided by the source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the external data source */,
  "import_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was imported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id")
)
